arc.headline: Conventions complain in public
arc.brief: Two cohorts have left with a story. Bookings haven't dried up, but they will if the next visit goes the same way.

arc.headline: Host Credibility Restoration
arc.brief: Invite a patient cohort, manage the hosting plan actively, and let them leave praising the operations grade.

arc.headline: Convention bookings paused
arc.brief: Bureaus are steering conventions elsewhere. Prove the hall is ready before the calendar reopens.
arc.successCondition: reach 72 operations grade AND 65 tenant satisfaction
